description: S3 bucket open to everyone with read permissions
recommended_action: Enable Block Public Access on S3 bucket
Restrict SSH to specific IP ranges

description: RDS database without encryption at rest
RDS database publicly accessible from internet

recommended_action: Enable default S3 encryption (SSE-S3 or KMS)

description: EC2 instance has public IP address
recommended_action: Move EC2 to private subnet with NAT

description: Security group allows HTTP on port 80 to 0.0.0.0/0
recommended_action: Restrict HTTP to load balancer only
Enable backup encryption in RDS settings

description: Root AWS account used for daily operations
recommended_action: Create IAM users and use those instead
Enable CloudTrail for all API logging

description: Using default VPC without custom security rules
recommended_action: Create custom VPC with proper segmentation
Enable MFA for all IAM users
Make RDS snapshot private and encrypted

description: S3 bucket versioning disabled - no recovery
recommended_action: Enable versioning on critical S3 buckets
Restrict RDP to VPN IP only

description: Lambda function not running in VPC
recommended_action: Deploy Lambda in private VPC subnet
Enable ElastiCache encryption in transit and at rest
Restrict Elasticsearch to VPC access only

description: ALB/NLB listener using HTTP instead of HTTPS
recommended_action: Update listener to use HTTPS only

description: CloudFront not protected by AWS WAF
IAM access keys not rotated in 90 days
recommended_action: Rotate old access keys and delete unused
Add descriptions to security group rules

description: Security group is not attached to any resources
Elastic IP allocated but not in use
AMI images missing backup schedule tags

recommended_action: Configure DLQ for async Lambda invocations

description: Lambda function timeout set to maximum
recommended_action: Reduce Lambda timeout to appropriate value

description: Auto Scaling group missing mandatory tags

recommended_action: Enable deletion protection on critical databases

description: RDS backup retention less than 7 days
recommended_action: Increase backup retention to minimum 7 days

description: DynamoDB table with no TTL for old records
recommended_action: Configure TTL on old records for auto cleanup
Enable ECR image scanning on push
Use KMS encryption for ECR repositories
Create custom policy with least privilege

description: Weak password policy for IAM console

recommended_action: Restrict NACL rules to required ports

description: VPC Flow Logs disabled for network monitoring
recommended_action: Enable VPC Flow Logs for all VPCs
Use VPN or encrypted tunnels for VPC peering

description: CloudFormation stack has drift from template
S3 bucket with public access block disabled
recommended_action: Enable Block Public Access on S3

description: S3 bucket ACL set to public-read or public-read-write
S3 bucket policy allows public access
recommended_action: Update bucket policy to restrict public access

description: S3 bucket accessible by cross-account principal
S3 Object Lock not enabled for compliance
recommended_action: Enable S3 Object Lock for immutability

description: Systems Manager Parameter Store using default key
recommended_action: Use custom KMS key for Parameter Store

description: CloudWatch Logs retention set to indefinite
EventBridge rule without dead letter queue
NAT Gateway running but not used

recommended_action: Enable EBS encryption for new volumes

description: AWS GuardDuty not enabled for threat detection
recommended_action: Enable GuardDuty in all AWS regions

description: AWS Config not enabled for resource tracking
recommended_action: Enable AWS Config for audit trail

description: Amazon Macie not enabled for data discovery
recommended_action: Enable Macie to discover sensitive data

description: WAF rule created but not attached to resource
recommended_action: Attach WAF to ALB or CloudFront

description: Default security group allows all traffic

recommended_action: Enable deletion protection on production DBs
